entries.title: Day 0 Baseline
entries.summary: Reinitialized the public Turnloop baseline after the contaminated shared-environment run. The framework code and current Corebound prototype were preserved, while prior journal history, queues, prompt artifacts, and generated site data were reset for a clean restart.

fields.Summary: Reinitialized the public Turnloop baseline after the contaminated shared-environment run. The framework code and current Corebound prototype were preserved, while prior journal history, queues, prompt artifacts, and generated site data were reset for a clean restart.
fields.Files touched: agents/historylog.md, agents/orchestrate_status.md, agents/research_status.md, agents/work/task.md, agents/work/tasksbacklog.md, agents/work/tasksarchive.md, agents/work/tasksbackburner.md, agents/work/quickfix.md, agents/work/expectations.md, agents/ideas/, agents/work/, site/data.json, site/index.html, site/style.css
fields.Decisions: Kept the current codebase and reduced script surface, but cleared operational artifacts so the restart begins from a presentable Day 0.
